title: papaver × monetii
intro: Papaver × monetii, also known as the Monet poppy, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Papaver rhoeas and Papaver somniferum. This plant is a rich source of opiates, including morphine and codeine, which possess analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Papaver × monetii have been used to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, while also possessing sedative effects. Herbal preparations of Papaver × monetii include infusions, tinctures, and poultices, which can be used to create topical creams and ointments for pain relief and skin conditions.
